eventSummary:
Research by Solidus Labs identifies 12 crypto exchanges with self-trade ratios exceeding 80% in BTC/USDT pairs during Q1 2026. The inflated volume figures are being used to attract institutional investors under false pretenses.
Sources:
- https://soliduslabs.com/reports/wash-trading-2026
- https://twitter.com/soliduslabs/status/sample1

Coordinated pump-and-dump operation detected targeting low-cap altcoins on three major DEXes. On-chain analysis reveals a cluster of 47 wallets executing layering strategies, generating $4.2M in artificial trading volume before dumping.
Sources:
- https://twitter.com/zachxbt/status/sample2
- https://dune.com/sample-dashboard

Independent audit of Tier-2 exchanges reveals that reported 24h trading volume on CoinGecko is inflated by an average of 340%. Wash trading bots execute round-trip trades at near-zero cost to boost exchange rankings.
Sources:
- https://coingecko.com/reports/market-integrity-2026
- https://bitcointalk.org/sample-thread

SEC enforcement action against Exchange XYZ reveals systematic wash trading program operated between 2024-2026, artificially boosting reported volume by $1.8B across 200+ trading pairs. Settlement reached for $48M.
Sources:
- https://sec.gov/litigation/sample-action
- https://twitter.com/sec_news/status/sample3

Academic paper from Cornell Tech documents spoofing patterns across 5 major crypto exchanges, showing large order placement and cancellation within milliseconds creates false price discovery. Pattern identified in 23% of daily BTC order flow.
Sources:
- https://arxiv.org/abs/sample-paper
- https://twitter.com/cornelltech/status/sample4
